name: OGC
about: The Ontario Golf Club offers a full-service country club experience, combining a traditional golf course with modern amenities like Trackman simulators. The venue provides both outdoor play and indoor technology for practice and play, appealing to golfers looking for a comprehensive club environment. It features a pub restaurant, event spaces, and instruction services, making it a destination for both serious golfers and social gatherings.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Trackman technology for accurate shot analysis
Full-service restaurant and pub dining on-site
Combination of outdoor course and indoor simulator options

food_and_drink.notes: Full restaurant service available with varied dining options

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium launch monitor technology for accurate ball and club tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While you can bring your own clubs, the venue likely provides rental options for simulator use.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not permitted as the venue has an on-site restaurant and full bar service.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulator session take?
faq.answer: An 18-hole simulator session typically takes 1-2 hours depending on group size and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the Ontario Golf Club welcomes families and has amenities suitable for children, though adult supervision is recommended for simulator areas.
